text: Being here, I sense a duality of spaces—one open and tranquil, scattered with resting points, the other rich with information and colorful design, inviting inquiry. The quiet of the lounge evokes a contemplative mood, while the exhibition wall stimulates curiosity. I feel as if I am walking the boundary between restful introspection and energetic learning. The presence of research and development themes kindles a spirit of progress and wonder about human ingenuity. Perhaps, in this juxtaposition, I am reminded that both rest and exploration are essential to wisdom.
